hero.subtitle: Welcome to the Korean Catholic Community of Connecticut
about.title: About Our Parish
about.description: Praise Jesus! Sacred Heart of Jesus Korean Catholic Parish belongs to the Archdiocese of Hartford and is a Korean Catholic community nestled in Wethersfield, Connecticut. Our parish is composed of approximately 200 faithful from 35 regions across Connecticut.
about.description2: Our parish currently has various small communities including the Pastoral Council, Liturgy Ministry, Legion of Mary, and Sacred Heart Society, where parishioners serve with devotion. We look forward to walking the journey of faith with you.
